summary: A clipped local CBS News package about new USCIS security checks: a studio anchor with fingerprinting B-roll, a sit-down interview with an immigration attorney, and a USCIS spokesman quote card. Standard TV news reporting, no music or original spectacle production. Out of scope.
notable_text: USCIS has implemented new security checks to strengthen the vetting and screening of applicants... (USCIS Spokesman Zach Kahler quote card)
